description: Static asset @ alias expansion: piko:svg and piko:img src attributes with @ alias are expanded to module-absolute paths during annotation

assertNodes.description: piko:svg src attribute should be expanded from @/lib/icons/arrow.svg to testmodule/lib/icons/arrow.svg
piko:img src attribute should be expanded from @/lib/images/logo.png to testmodule/lib/images/logo.png
